mapper.select: SELECT board_type_idx, board_type_code, board_type_name, board_can_comment, board_min_role FROM board_type ORDER BY board_type_idx
SELECT board_type_idx, board_type_code, board_type_name, board_can_comment, board_min_role FROM board_type WHERE board_type_code = #{typeCode}

SELECT b.board_idx, b.mem_idx, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_ip, b.board_thumbnail, b.board_view_count, b.board_type_idx, b.board_regdate, b.board_moddate, b.board_is_deleted, bt.board_type_name, bt.board_type_code, mp.mem_nickname, m.mem_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply r WHERE r.board_idx = b.board_idx AND r.reply_is_deleted = 'N') AS reply_count FROM board b LEFT JOIN board_type bt ON b.board_type_idx = bt.board_type_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON b.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx LEFT JOIN member m ON b.mem_idx = m.mem_idx WHERE b.board_is_deleted = 'N'
AND bt.board_type_code = #{typeCode}
AND b.board_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND b.board_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND mp.mem_nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (b.board_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.board_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY b.board_idx DESC

SELECT b.board_idx, b.mem_idx, b.board_title, b.board_view_count, b.board_type_idx, b.board_regdate, b.board_is_deleted, bt.board_type_name, bt.board_type_code, mp.mem_nickname, m.mem_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply r WHERE r.board_idx = b.board_idx AND r.reply_is_deleted = 'N') AS reply_count, (b.board_content LIKE '%<img%') AS has_image FROM board b LEFT JOIN board_type bt ON b.board_type_idx = bt.board_type_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON b.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx LEFT JOIN member m ON b.mem_idx = m.mem_idx WHERE b.board_is_deleted = 'N'
AND bt.board_type_code = #{typeCode}
AND b.board_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND b.board_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND mp.mem_nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (b.board_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.board_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY b.board_idx DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board b LEFT JOIN board_type bt ON b.board_type_idx = bt.board_type_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON b.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx WHERE b.board_is_deleted = 'N'
AND bt.board_type_code = #{typeCode}
AND b.board_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND b.board_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND mp.mem_nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (b.board_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.board_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT b.board_idx, b.mem_idx, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_ip, b.board_thumbnail, b.board_view_count, b.board_like, b.board_type_idx, b.board_regdate, b.board_moddate, b.board_is_deleted, bt.board_type_code, bt.board_type_name, mp.mem_nickname, m.mem_id FROM board b LEFT JOIN board_type bt ON b.board_type_idx = bt.board_type_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON b.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx LEFT JOIN member m ON b.mem_idx = m.mem_idx WHERE b.board_idx = #{boardIdx} AND b.board_is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET board_like = board_like + 1 WHERE board_idx = #{boardIdx}
UPDATE reply SET reply_like = reply_like + 1 WHERE reply_idx = #{replyIdx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board ( mem_idx, board_title, board_content, board_ip, board_thumbnail, board_type_idx ) VALUES ( #{memIdx}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardIp}, #{boardThumbnail}, #{boardTypeIdx} )
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET board_title = #{boardTitle}, board_content = #{boardContent}, board_moddate = NOW() WHERE board_idx = #{boardIdx}
UPDATE board SET board_is_deleted = 'Y', board_deldate = NOW() WHERE board_idx = #{boardIdx}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply WHERE board_idx = #{boardIdx} AND reply_is_deleted = 'N'

SELECT r.reply_idx, r.board_idx, r.mem_idx, r.reply_content, r.reply_ip, r.reply_like, r.reply_regdate, r.reply_moddate, r.reply_is_deleted, r.reply_ref, r.reply_step, r.reply_depth, mp.mem_nickname, m.mem_id FROM reply r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.mem_idx = m.mem_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON r.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx WHERE r.board_idx = #{boardIdx} AND r.reply_is_deleted = 'N'
ORDER BY COALESCE(r.reply_ref, r.reply_idx) DESC, r.reply_step ASC
ORDER BY COALESCE(r.reply_ref, r.reply_idx) ASC, r.reply_step ASC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT reply_ref) FROM reply WHERE board_idx = #{boardIdx} AND reply_is_deleted = 'N' AND reply_depth = 0

SELECT r.reply_idx, r.board_idx, r.mem_idx, r.reply_content, r.reply_ip, r.reply_regdate, r.reply_moddate, r.reply_is_deleted, r.reply_ref, r.reply_step, r.reply_depth, r.reply_like, mp.mem_nickname, m.mem_id FROM reply r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.mem_idx = m.mem_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON r.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx WHERE r.board_idx = #{boardIdx} AND r.reply_is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY COALESCE(r.reply_ref, r.reply_idx) DESC, r.reply_step ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reply ( board_idx, mem_idx, reply_content, reply_ip, reply_ref, reply_step, reply_depth ) VALUES ( #{boardIdx}, #{memIdx}, #{replyContent}, #{replyIp}, #{replyRef}, #{replyStep}, #{replyDepth} )
mapper.select: SELECT reply_idx, board_idx, mem_idx, reply_content, reply_ip, reply_regdate, reply_ref, reply_step, reply_depth FROM reply WHERE reply_idx = #{replyIdx}
mapper.update: UPDATE reply SET reply_content = #{replyContent}, reply_moddate = NOW() WHERE reply_idx = #{replyIdx}
UPDATE reply SET reply_is_deleted = 'Y', reply_deldate = NOW() WHERE reply_idx = #{replyIdx}
